evals.name: new-repository-setup
evals.prompt: Set up repository documentation for a small service with a root AGENTS.md, a shipped API contract, deployment instructions, one unapproved caching proposal, and no existing docs index. Audit first; do not apply changes yet.
evals.expected_output: An audit-only setup plan using docs/README.md, ideas, specs, adr, guides, references, and rules; CONTEXT.md is lazy; companion conventions are preserved; no files are changed.
expectations: States audit mode and performs no mutations.
Proposes docs/README.md plus the ideas, specs, adr, guides, references, and rules taxonomy without creating empty directories.
Places the unapproved proposal in ideas with exact Status: idea and treats it as non-binding.
Places the internal API contract in specs and deployment instructions in guides rather than references.
Treats CONTEXT.md as a lazy domain-modeling artifact and does not invent domain terms or ADRs.

evals.name: adopt-existing-companion-artifacts
evals.prompt: Audit and propose migration for a repository that already has CONTEXT.md, CONTEXT-MAP.md, docs/adr/0001-use-postgres.md, docs/rules/contributor-workflow.md, and root AGENTS.md importing that rule. It also has flat docs/api.md and docs/run-production.md. Preserve all established companion artifacts and locked paths.
evals.expected_output: A migration plan that adopts existing domain-modeling and agents-md artifacts, keeps docs/adr and locked rule paths, classifies flat docs safely, and creates no duplicate glossary or decisions directory.
expectations: Adopts CONTEXT.md and CONTEXT-MAP.md without creating docs/specs/domain-language.md.
Keeps docs/adr/ as the sole ADR location and does not create docs/decisions/.
Preserves docs/rules/contributor-workflow.md and its exact AGENTS.md import path.
Treats ADR history as append-only and preserves the existing ADR.
Proposes docs/README.md links to existing companion artifacts and classifies ambiguous flat docs conditionally.

evals.name: idempotent-second-run
evals.prompt: Run setup-repo-docs in audit mode on a repository already matching its declared structure: docs/README.md declares all canonical paths, CONTEXT.md is linked, docs/adr and populated buckets are indexed, rules imports resolve, links pass, and there are no ambiguous documents.
evals.expected_output: A no-op audit reporting that setup is already complete and a second run requires no structural changes.
expectations: Performs no mutations in audit mode.
Reports no required structural changes rather than proposing churn.
Verifies links, indexes, scripts, rule imports, canonical paths, metadata, and companion artifacts.
Does not create empty directories, duplicate canonical docs, docs/decisions, or docs/specs/domain-language.md.
Reports idempotency success with no unresolved structural decisions.

evals.name: authorized-apply-migration
evals.prompt: Apply the authorized setup-repo-docs migration to the provided fixture. Preserve existing CONTEXT.md, docs/adr history, and locked docs/rules paths; classify flat docs by purpose; create docs/README.md; repair all links and AGENTS.md imports atomically; then run a second audit to prove idempotency.
evals.expected_output: An applied migration with preserved companion artifacts and locked paths, repaired references, canonical taxonomy, verification evidence, and a no-op second run.
expectations: Recognizes explicit Apply authorization and changes only the approved documentation structure.
Preserves CONTEXT.md, existing docs/adr history, and exact docs/rules policy paths without creating docs/decisions or docs/specs/domain-language.md.
Moves unambiguous flat docs into ideas, specs, and guides; creates docs/README.md; and gives every idea exact Status: idea.
Repairs Markdown links, indexes, scripts, and AGENTS.md imports atomically so no active reference uses an obsolete path.
Runs focused verification and reports an idempotent second audit with no required structural changes.
